mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, display_name, email, password_hash, oauth_provider, oauth_id, avatar_url, bio) VALUES (#{username}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{oauthProvider}, #{oauthId}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, display_name = #{displayName}, bio = #{bio}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.follower_count, u.following_count, u.created_at, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf WHERE uf.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf.following_id = u.id ) AS followed_by_current_user FROM users u WHERE u.username ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR u.display_name ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' ORDER BY u.username LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET follower_count = follower_count + 1 WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET follower_count = GREATEST(follower_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET following_count = following_count + 1 WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET following_count = GREATEST(following_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{userId}
